paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.61, representing an 8.01 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 21 sessions, the price change is -26.31 percent.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, one of which discloses the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
